whenToUse.summary: A free-plus-shipping physical book offer where the prospect pays only shipping (typically $7.95). The book acquires a buyer-quality lead; an order bump on the payment step and two OTOs after purchase cover ad costs and generate profit. The confirmation page delivers high-value bonus training that bridges to a higher-priced backend offer. Use when the client has (or can produce) a book and wants to build a premium buyer list while liquidating ad spend.
goals: Acquire buyer-quality leads via a free book (pay shipping only)
Establish the author as the expert / Attractive Character
Cover ad costs with the order bump + 2 OTOs
Bridge new buyers into a higher-priced backend offer
signals: Client has or is writing a book / printed asset
Goal is a premium buyer list + authority positioning
Cold paid traffic with a defined backend (course/coaching/event)
Willing to ship a physical product for the cost of shipping
antiSignals: Front end is a non-book digital product $27-$97 -> SLO Funnel
Front end is a non-book physical sample -> 2-Step Tripwire
No physical/printed asset, just a lead magnet -> Lead Magnet Funnel (lead group)
Recurring subscription is the core -> Membership/Continuity

pageStructure.purpose: Sell the free book (pay shipping only) with a 2-step order form: Step 1 captures shipping address (abandoned-cart lead), Step 2 collects shipping payment + the order bump.
keyElements: Hook headline ('Get my book FREE — just cover shipping')
Author Epiphany Bridge story (why the book exists)
Value framing: book free, you pay only $7.95 shipping
Step 2: payment + ORDER BUMP (audiobook / companion workbook)
widgets: Skill 44: Two-Step Order Form (address step -> shipping-payment step)
Skill 44: Order Bump element on the payment step
GHL Payments: free book (charge $7.95 shipping only) + bump product

pageStructure.purpose: Immediately after purchase, present a one-click upsell (audiobook, companion course, or live training) to cover ad cost.
keyElements: 'Wait — add this to your book order' interrupt headline
Upsell VSL or short copy (audiobook / course)

pageStructure.purpose: Second upsell or a downsell of OTO 1 (payment plan / lite version) to maximize and recover order value.
keyElements: Second upsell offer OR downsell of OTO 1

pageStructure.purpose: Confirm the order, deliver high-value bonus training, and bridge the new buyer to a higher-priced backend offer.
keyElements: High-ticket backend CTA (book a call / apply / next offer)
widgets: Skill 44: Calendar widget (book a backend call) if backend is high-ticket

primaryPersona.script: Free-plus-shipping book recipe — 2-step order, bump + 2 OTOs, bonus-bridge to backend
primaryPersona.role: Governs the page structure, element checklist, and bump/OTO placement

salesScript.script: Hook / Story / Offer with the author's Epiphany Bridge selling the book; Star/Story/Solution on the order page
salesScript.why: The book sells on the author's story (why they wrote it) and a compelling hook; the Epiphany Bridge carries the emotional sell while the offer frames the free-plus-shipping deal.

supportingPersonas.script: Headline + benefit-stack formulas; order-bump and OTO microcopy
supportingPersonas.role: Writes the order-page copy, bump, and upsells

supportingPersonas.script: Attractive Character authority + Value Ladder bonus-bridge
supportingPersonas.role: Positions the author as the expert and bridges the bonus into the backend
Frames the front-end hook and the book's unique-mechanism promise

copyFramework.notes: The Cookbook governs the free-plus-shipping recipe; the author's Epiphany Bridge story sells the book; Copywriting Secrets writes the order/bump/OTO copy; Blackbook positions authority and bridges the confirmation-page bonus into the backend. The book is a buyer-list builder and authority play, not a profit center on its own.

skill6Steps: Create Funnel -> name with client prefix -> Create
Add New Step 4 = 'Confirmation / Bonus Training Page'
skill44Widgets: Two-Step Order Form (address step -> shipping-payment step) on Step 1
Order Bump element on the payment step
One-Click Upsell elements on Steps 2 and 3
Calendar widget on Step 4 if the backend is a high-ticket call
products: Free book product charging $7.95 shipping only in GHL Payments
ghlBuild.notes: Pre-build the 2-step order form, order bump, one-click upsells, products, tags, and (if high-ticket backend) the calendar via Skill 44 (or GHL MCP/API). Charge shipping only on the book product. The confirmation page hosts bonus training + the backend bridge; if the backend is a call, embed the Skill 44 calendar there. Pages build as GHL-compatible HTML in the code block, or Vercel-built and embedded when heavy.
